programme.title: Guardians
programme.desc: Twilight Cove, a small forgotten town, is besieged by hideous creatures summoned into our dimension. It's only a matter of time before the army of creatures attacks the rest of civilization and wreaks havoc upon the world. At dusk, a beat-up truck containing a rag-tag team of hardened mercenaries rolls into town, and this is not the first time they've been called in to exterminate they are part of a secret society that has been operating outside of the government and the public eye for thousands of years. Their mission is to keep our world safe from evil-of our own creation and from beyond.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.” The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.

programme.title: JUNGWOO 'SUGAR' MV
programme.desc: NCT JUNGWOO's first solo single “SUGAR” is a groovy pop song with swing‑infused drums, a witty bassline, and a smooth, catchy melody. The lyrics send a warm message of gratitude to fans, wishing that past memories and future moments are all sweet. The music video brings this sweetness to life with colorful, sugar-inspired visuals, while the performance highlights JUNGWOO's stylish movements and precise choreography, showcasing his unique stage presence.

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: NCT DREAM The 4th Album 'DREAMSCAPE' Playlist
programme.desc: 3. Flying Kiss NCT DREAM's 4th full-length album 「DREAMSCAPE」 follows their previous release 「DREAM( )SCAPE」, portraying the group's second journey as they break away from a dark, desensitized reality in search of an ideal dreamlike space. 6. Best of Me 8. Heavenly 9. Night Poem 4. i hate fruits 5. No Escape 7. YOU The title 「DREAMSCAPE」 signifies a long-awaited, dreamlike landscape and world, capturing the excitement and freedom of youth within this utopian realm. Across 11 tracks, a dynamic storyline unfolds like a fairytale, vividly portraying the radiant moments of youth in a dramatic way. 1. INTRO : DREAMSCAPE [Track List] 2. When I'm With You 10. Off The Wall 11. Rains in Heaven

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter Zitten! This artist made his debut in 2005 with the EP Rock Doves and has been nourishing the hearts of countless listeners with his delicate lyrical lyrics and heartwarming music since then. Also known for drawing his inspiration from various everyday elements he comforts our souls in a calm yet powerful way. Last December Zitten released the Christmas song All You Need Is A Carol to tell us not to take anything for granted. Then in January this year he started a new project to produce music inspired by places he visited books he read things he purchased and films he watched. The very first outcome of that new project is the song Little forest which he performs on I'm LIVE. He also performs Let's do well Something to say and more to showcase the essence of his artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE this week and meet Zitten!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter Choi Gonne! Choi Gonne burst into the music scene in 2010 with the EP 36.5°. Since then she has covered numerous genres of music ranging from folk music rock and jazz not to mention pansori that she learned to sing when she was a child. She's also known for her mix of melodic acoustic themes powerful vocals and sheer lyrical prowess which together make her one of a kind. Last but not least she's the first Korean artist to be invited three times to perform at the Glastonbury Festival in the U.K. In this episode Choi Gonne performs ‘HIGHLANDER' ‘Eric's song' and more to display the essence of her artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE this week and meet Choi Gonne!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is Band Nah! Band Nah is composed of vocalist and guitarist Nah Sang-hyun drummer Kang Hyun-woong and bassist Paiiek. The three students at Seoul National University met each other through the school's composition club and then they released their first song together in 2014 as part of the Why Not Study project organized by the university. The following year they made their official debut in the music scene and have been actively growing their discography and exploring further new facets of their sound since then. Their performance of the song Nights received rave reviews in VOCALPLAY 2 in 2019 and then in 2020 they won the Rookie Green Friends of the Greenplugged-Seoul 2020 making us anticipate their future. In this episode Band Nah performs Lights Life Colour Are You There? All The Time and Nights to show off their musicality. Tune in to I'm LIVE and take a glimpse into their artistic world!

programme.title: Simply K-Pop CON-TOUR Ep.582
programme.desc: ILY:1, YGIG, KISS OF LIFE, ARTBEAT v, Yoon Seobin, BXB, fishingirls, Q6IX, XEED, ABLUE

programme.title: After School Club
programme.desc: We've got a lot of prizes ready for those who participate on After School Club, so if you want to make some special memories, don't hesitate!The group to keep your eye on in 2023, tripleS! They've won over the K-Pop fans' hearts even before their debut, and they are coming to ASC.The first ASC episode of 2023 with tripleS! Don't miss out!Far apart, but together in heart!

programme.title: After School Club
programme.desc: We've got a lot of prizes ready for those who participate on After School Club, so if you want to make some special memories, don't hesitate!Being themselves no matter what people say, PURPLE KISS!PURPLE KISS is back with their confident new song ‘Nerdy', and they are coming to ASC.Far apart, but together in heart!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is Korea's ballad prince Jung Seung Hwan! Jung Seung Hwan known for his signature suave and captivating voice released his first physical album in two years — an EP titled Five Words Left Unsaid. The album is full of heartrending ballads that show off the artist's prowess including the lead single We From The First. It is about a man who develops romantic feelings for a close friend but is unable to express himself and quietly suffers alone. The album also features a song written by IU Love Letter which is known to be the first song she gave to another artist. The ballad prince is here on I'm LIVE once again to impress everyone with a brand new setlist including We From The First Voice Walking into the forest and more. Tune in to I'm LIVE and let the artist melt your soul!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is JANNABI! JANNABI brought a huge retro sensation to Korea's music scene upon their debut in 2014. Since then the band has developed their unique retro vibe in both music and fashion. The band is back with its third full-length album The Land of Fantasy to nourish our souls once again. Through its 13 tracks all written by CHOI JUNG HOON with the help of guitarist KIM DO HYUNG this land of fantasy beautifully captures hope love courage and friendship. Just like their previous releases the new album provides an eclectic yet coherent collection of folk-rock ballads and playful pop-infused melodies but with greater depth and beauty. In this episode JANNABI performs A Ballad of Non Le Jon Confession Show The King of Romance Time I Know Where The Rainbow has Fallen and Bluebird Spread your wings! Tune in to I'm LIVE and enjoy their new songs live!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter Damons year! This artist started his career as a musician in 2017 with the song Couldn't Sleep. Since then he has mesmerized listeners with his heartwarming melodies and sentiments. Also known for his poetic lyrics like I will hold your hands you can just relax It was like an ice burn Then one light came into my blurry eyes it reached its hand out and lifted me up he presents music that suits all 365 days and 12 months of the year just like his stage name Damons year (day month year). In this episode he performs Rainbow ai Cherry Your Knight yours and Pattern to showcase the essence of his artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented musician!

programme.desc: Scientists are developing more powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion China's dominance of the supply chain for rare earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: Exploring the world of biocomputing scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry, but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilization they are finding funding for them.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: The idea of flying cars has largely remained science fiction, until now a new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon these efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy but to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.But a Bloomberg investigation reveals that several private hospital companies funded.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis. (S1 E01)

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Bride of the Century
programme.desc: Taeyang Group Is The Largest Conglomerate In South Korea, But The Choi Family, Who Runs Taeyang, Has Supposedly Been Under A Hundred-Year Curse - The First Bride Of The Eldest Son Will Always Die. Choi Gang Ju, The Current Heir To Taeyang Group, Had Been Arranged To Marry Heiress Jang I Gyeong When She Suddenly Disappears.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Rakhwale
programme.desc: Rakhwale 2.0 | in this first episode, host Vikas Verma speaks with retired IAF Wing Commander Arijit Ghosh as he shares inspiring real-life stories of courage and sacrifice. A gripping account of the Indian Air Force's valour and the spirit of those who guard our skies.

programme.title: LT Insider
programme.desc: In this episode of Lallantop Insider, Chetan Bhagat shares his thoughts on Gen Z dating, social media validation, hookup culture, and modern romance. He also talks about his new book 12 Years: My Messed-up Love Story.

programme.title: The Lallantop
programme.desc: Today on the LT show, Siddhant breaks down a viral AI debate sparked by Hyperwrite AI CEO Matt Shumer's essay, and what the real-world risks look like. Also: a USTR map controversy involving PoK/Aksai Chin, and Bangladesh's election landslide for BNP.

programme.title: Duniyadari
programme.desc: BNP swept Bangladesh's parliamentary election, returning to power after nearly 20 years and putting Tarique Rahman in the spotlight as the likely next prime minister. We break down what drove the win, Tarique's key promises, and what it could mean for India.

programme.title: Kharcha Paani
programme.desc: Kharcha Paani explains the airline vs government face-off over DGCA's new fatigue rules after IndiGo's December 2025 chaos, and why FIA says the norms could disrupt schedules and raise fares. What it means for delays, cancellations, and passengers—decoded.

programme.title: Social List

programme.desc: Jane sets up the golf ball and takes a shot, which perfectly lands in the hole.Jerry takes a shot, but the ball barely moves.Jerry hits the ball, and it flies off, breaking a window

programme.title: Juggler
programme.desc: Super Hungry" is a comedic adventure showcasing Jerry's insatiable appetite and Jane's playful attempts to feed him. Jane's idea of using "Hunger Syrup" leads to unexpected consequences as Jerry accidentally consumes the entire bottle, causing his hunger to intensify. A hilarious chase ensues as Jerry devours everyt_hing in sight, leaving Jane both amazed and exhausted. With a clever twist involving chili and a bucket of water, Jerry's hunger is finally satiated, resulting in laughter and relief for both characters

programme.title: Music Masti
programme.desc: Jerry's TV time is interrupted by Jane, who introduces him to an interactive book of alphabets and images. Jerry's playful antics and laughter lead to a series of imaginative associations between the alphabet and objects. They _hinage in a joyful exchange, using toys and everyday items to represent the letters and create a fun learning experience. The scene ends with a _hint of more playful learning adventures to come

programme.title: Magic Marker
programme.desc: JERRY, a curious and mischievous toddler, playing on the floor withsome toys. He notices amagic marker on the coffee table and picks it up.He starts to draw on the walls and furniture, creating colorful and abstract designs.

programme.title: BirthdayCake
programme.desc: Jerry playfully disrupts Jane's cleaning routine by scattering toys and bowls. He surprises Jane by juggling the toys and later the crockeries, showcasing his dexterity and coordination. Jane joins in the fun, and they _hinage in a playful juggling act together, creating a harmonious and entertaining moment in their home.

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: When a power company worker finds an abandoned eagle's nest precariously perched atop a wind turbine the SECRET LAB KIDS build a homemade rocket to fire a rope up to him so he can lower the nest to safety.

programme.title: A Gem of a Deal
programme.desc: When a con artist purchases Nicky's granny's house for a fake gemstone necklace, the SECRET LAB KIDS must learn about minerals in order to save granny from ruin.

programme.title: Fashion Genes
programme.desc: In order to have the best girl modeling her designs, Nicky decides to clone herself.

programme.title: Amusement park
programme.desc: ," Jane and Jerry _hinage in a playful dance-off, constantly trying to one-up each other. Their antics escalate as they use various props to outdo the other, leading to a comical series of mishaps. However, when their beloved music player breaks, they realize the power of their shared passion for music and come together to create their own joyful tune, ending on a heartwarming note of friendship and celebration.

programme.title: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: A close-upof the aliens' feet as they walk into Jane and Jerry's room. They wake upto see the aliens have taken over their house. The aliens break the glass with laserbeams that come out of their eyes.Jane and Jerry run for their lives as the aliens chase them through the house. Janefinds a torch and uses it as a weapon to defend herself

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awasome Epi 03
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 21
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Armor Monster Ep 21
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Armor Monster Ep 25
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: It's name is Mulsanne, Bentely Mulsanne. programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: A journey to experience the most revered religious sites of India. A spiritual – travel series which unfolds untold stories and takes its viewers on a devotional journey."

programme.desc: Each year, hundreds of critically endangered manatees are killed in U.S. waters by boats, disease and cold weather. 2006 was the worst year on record for manatee deaths – 416 animals perished. programme.desc: It looks like something from another era—and it is! Mark discovers a trilobite beetle, a living relic that predates the dinosaurs.This giant black bee is more than just big—it's aggressive. Mark takes the sting and shows why it's one of the most feared pollinators.
